mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_collected_playlists (userId, playlistId) VALUES (#{userId}, #{playlistId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_collected_playlists WHERE userId = #{userId} AND playlistId = #{playlistId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_collected_playlists WHERE userId = #{userId} AND playlistId = #{playlistId}

SELECT p.id, p.userId, p.name AS title, p.coverUrl, p.coverNetworkUrl, p.backgroundUrl, p.backgroundNetworkUrl, p.profile, p.createdAt, p.type, p.is_private AS isPrivate FROM playlists p INNER JOIN user_collected_playlists ucp ON p.id = ucp.playlistId WHERE ucp.userId = #{userId} ORDER BY ucp.collectedAt DESC
